narrative:
Huntsburg Twp township has 1,411 registered voters, with 54.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.6 percentage points.
